prompt: Create diataxis documentation for this Python project

assertions.text: diataxis.toml exists and references actual project concepts
Structure covers build pipeline, scoring, and structure schema topics
How-to guide titles start with 'How to'
Content references actual file paths or concepts from the project
All 4 quadrant types have at least one file
Reference docs use consistent formatting (tables or definition lists)
Tutorial guides the user through a concrete task with visible results
